title: Command Not Found
scenario: A colleague customized the server but left several shortcuts broken. The 'll' shortcut is missing, and the application is crashing because a required environment variable is not defined. Fix the shell profile.
mission: Modify ~/.bashrc to define the ll alias and export APP_ENV=staging.

hints.title: Where to look
hints.content: You will need to edit the `~/.bashrc` file to fix aliases and environment variables.

hints.title: Adding Aliases
hints.content: Append the alias declaration: `alias ll='ls -la'` to `~/.bashrc`.

hints.title: Exporting Variables
hints.content: Export the variable by appending `export APP_ENV=staging` to `~/.bashrc`.

acceptance_criteria.description: APP_ENV is exported in .bashrc with value staging
